note: Line-split placement sounds good functionally, but there's a hard constraint from the bench harness: each of our patch.txt files must contain ONLY our own feature's diff (git diff against the pristine HEAD). If we edit concurrently, a plain 'git diff' at the end would capture BOTH of our changes mixed into one file, breaking that constraint for whoever runs it second.
